service.name: Twilio Studio API
service.description_for_ai: Visual flow builder for phone and messaging automations. IVR (interactive voice response), SMS chatbots, WhatsApp bots without code. Execute flows via API to trigger automated conversations.

auth.cost: Free tier included. Per message/call pricing

capabilities.description_for_ai: Trigger a Twilio Studio flow execution. Use to start an automated conversation, IVR call, or SMS bot.

To.description: Phone number to contact in E.164

Parameters.description: Custom variables to pass to flow
